# ETA Delay Playbook

When ETA slips materially:
- Check whether the position feed is fresh.
- Check whether the vessel is at anchor or simply slowing on approach.
- Review recent ETA revision logs.
- Review berth congestion context for the discharge port.
- Reassess customs and trucking timing.

Recommended communication:
- Tell the user what changed.
- Explain confidence.
- Suggest one next action.
